text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 231 

PLAN_BASIC_PREMIUM_NET_REBATE 

LABEL: Part D Basic Premium Net of Rebate 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the Part D Basic Premium. This amount is net of any Part A/B 
rebates applied to "buy down" the drug premium for Medicare Advantage plans. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PLAN_BASIC_PREMIUM_NET_REBATE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files)
